finding_results.notes: Removed repeated call-end formula and gave each closure beat a distinct consequence (driving near-miss, deliberate self-cutoff/phone-down decision, then immediate bodily backlash).
Converted the mid-chapter checklist into flowing prose while preserving motif continuity via two remaining isolated list blocks.

summary: All prose/copyedit findings for chapter_07 were addressed: repeated closure cadence was diversified with distinct sensory/decision outcomes, and checklist repetition was reduced by rewriting one list beat into continuous narration without softening scene pressure or continuity-critical detail.
